resources.string: Kĩrĩkanĩro kia Mũhũthĩri & Watho wĩigiĩ Ũgitĩri wa Ũndũ Kĩumbe

Welcome to Game Space! We attach great importance to your personal information and privacy. In order to protect your rights and comply with relevant regulatory requirements, we explain to you as follows: This Privacy Policy will help you understand the following contents:
1.How We Collect and Use Your Personal Information
2.How We Store and Protect Your Personal Information
3.How We Share, Transfer and Disclose Your Personal Information
4.How Your Personal Information is Transferred Across Borders
5.Your Rights to Your Personal Information
6.How We Handle the Personal Information of Children
7.Third-Party Service Providers and Services
8.Supplement and Update of the Policy
9.How to Contact Us
The Terms of Use will help you understand the following contents:
1.Game Space and its Services
2.Restrictions on the use of This Software and Service
3.Intellectual Property; Ownership
4.Considerations on Your Use of This Software and Service
5.About Updates
6.Software and Services Provided by Third Parties
7.Fees and Advertisement
8.Termination and Breach of Contract
9.Indemnification, DISCLAIMERS, LIMITATION OF LIABILITIES, Governing Laws and Dispute Resolution and Miscellaneous
Ndakwĩhoya ũhutie kĩnyitithania kĩ haha thĩ nĩgetha ũthome %1$s na %2$s.
Ndĩrĩ ho kĩrũgamĩrĩroinĩ gĩa programu kĩa ihinda rĩrĩ
Mũbango wa ũiguano nĩ ũkũheana indo kũringana na mũthako na ũruti wa wĩra wa thimũ.
Onia ndũmĩrĩri cia WhatsApp na Messenger ci mũthemba wa ngucanio
Kũrũga gwĩkĩra mwaki kũnyihagia maumĩrĩra ma thimũ kũhioha rĩrĩa ĩrongerera ũtũũro wa batarĩ.

Rĩrĩa thimũ yaku yanyitithanio kũrĩ canja ya kĩhumo kahindainĩ ga gũthaka, ũtambia wa mwaki nĩ ũkũrũga batarĩ nĩgetha ĩkĩre mwaki thimũ imwe kwa imwe, ĩkĩteithĩrĩria kũgirĩrĩria kũhioha na kũongerera ũtũũro wa batarĩ.
Kũrũga Gwĩkĩra mwaki nĩkũhotithĩtio. Gwĩkĩra mwaki wega kwa batarĩ nĩ gũkũnyihio
Kũrũga Gwĩkĩra mwaki nĩkũhotithĩtio. Gwĩkĩra mwaki batarĩ nĩ gũkũrũgamio
Gĩcunjĩ gĩa mwaki ũhũthĩrĩtwo nĩgetha gwĩkĩra mwaki batarĩ
Anjia gwĩkĩra mwaki thutha wa mũigana wa batarĩ wathi thĩ ya gĩthingiti gĩa gwĩkĩra mwaki.
Ũgarũrũku wa rangi ũteithagĩrĩriawega kũmenya maũndũ marathie mĩthakoinĩ, ĩkĩongagĩrĩraga mĩeke ya gũcinda
Garũra rangi wa mbica cia PUBG
Garũra rangi wa mbica cia PUBG
Terethithia na thĩinĩ kuma kĩhaaroinĩ nĩgetha ũhotithie Kĩhaaro kia Ũgĩ
Banga injini ya ET harĩ kwagĩrithia mũthako
Nĩũkuma mũbango wa kũhonokia hinya wahotithia Ũrũgamĩrĩri wa Ũthimi wa Mĩthako ya intanetinĩ.
Cagũra programu 2 nĩgetha ũhotithie kĩbũngo kĩrĩa kĩra thiũrũrũkira igũrũ rĩrĩa wĩ mĩthakoinĩ.
Mĩbango ya Kĩbũngo Kĩrĩa Kĩra Thiũrũrũkira Igũrũ
No programu 2 tu cihotithĩtio harĩ kĩbũngo kĩrĩa kĩra thiũrũrũkira igũrũ
Programu 2 irabatarania ha kĩbũngo kĩrĩa kĩra thiũrũrũkira igũrũ
Agĩrithie ũigananu wa netiwaki rĩrĩa ũrathaka mĩthako. Ahũthĩri erũ no mamĩgerie tũhũ harĩ thikũ imwe
Cenjia mũgambo waku rĩrĩa wĩ mĩthakoinĩ
Ona ihinda rĩa mũthako, ũhũthĩri wa data.
Terethithia nĩgetha wone kĩbungo kĩa Mũbango wa Mũthako
Igũrũ wa mathaa 2 ma gũthaka. Hurũka hanini mbere ya gũthie na mbere.
Igũrũ wa mathaa 4 mathakĩtwo mothe ũmũthĩ. Hurũka hanini mbere ya gũthie na mbere.
Thutha wa mathaa 2 hatarĩ kũrũgama gũthaka kana mathaa 4 ma gũtikania mĩthako
Rĩrĩa ĩhotithie, njĩra nguhĩ cia mũthako nĩcikũhithwo harĩ kĩrango kia muciĩ. Rugũria na ũrũgamĩrĩra mĩthako yothe thĩiniĩ wa %1$s nĩũndũ wa kĩrango kia muciĩ gĩtheru na ũmenyeru wa gũthaka wega.
%1$s ĩrabatara rũtha rwa Imenyithia nĩguo gũtindĩka imenyithia rĩrĩa mĩthako mĩerũ yarutwo yongererwo.
Hotithia Ũtungata wa Bathi ya Kũiga ya Mũthako
Hatirĩ %1$s mĩbango harĩ %2$s. No ũthie kũrĩ %3$s kuma kwĩ mũthako nĩguo kwongerera ũmwe (ĩranyitwo mbaru harĩ mathako merekeirio-gũkoma).
Cagũra programu ya mũthako kuma kũrĩ mũtaratara. programu njagũre nĩ kũruta wĩra harĩ mũbango wa mũthako.
Gũgũteithia gũcinda harĩ mũkũrũro wa kwanjĩria
Girĩrĩria iririkanio ingĩ to thimũ iraingĩra kana aramu
Gĩthimi kĩa mahinda ma kũriũka njaa ya mũthako.
Kũheana macokio ma gũcũnga thĩinĩ wa mĩthako mĩtiganu
Agĩrithia ũruti wĩra wa CPU na GPU otomatikarĩ nĩgetha ũgacĩrithie ũmenyeru wa mũthako
Nĩ ĩrũngĩtwo kũrĩ kĩrũgamĩrĩro kĩega. No noũbataire kũrora kũrĩ %1$s.
Kũruta wĩra na njĩra ya kũhũthĩra netiwaki
Nyihia ũtheri wa gĩcicio nĩgetha ũmenyerere kwona gwa maitho maku
Hurũka hanini nĩgetha ũhurũkie maitho maku
Ongerera ũtheri wa gĩcicio nĩgetha ũmenyerere kwona gwa maitho maku
Wĩtheme gũkoma na mũgongo waku kwa ihinda inene rĩrĩa ũrahũthĩra thimũ yaku
Akia iririkania cia ũgima wa mwĩrĩ na ũgitĩrĩ ciĩgiĩ maitho, mũikarĩre wa gũikara thĩ, mũtaratara wa gũtokorwo ngombo, na maingĩ.
Mũgambo wa iafoni wĩ igũrũ mũno
Ongerera mĩthako yaku wendete kũrĩ Game Space
Tũma makinya magambe nahinya na kĩhumo kĩa mũgambo kĩagĩrithĩtio
Mĩbango yothe ĩ handũ ha ũrutĩri wĩra nĩ ũgũbangũrwo ũcokere kĩrũgamĩrĩro kĩao kĩa mbere.
Wona tu yahotithio, Wathani wa Ũrugare wa Mũthako no kũnyihie wega ũrugarĩ wa thimũ na kũnenehie ihinda rĩa gũthaka.
Iganania thingo cia mũthako na ũtaũku nĩgetha ũtigĩrĩre ũmenyeru mwega wa gũthaka wa ihinda iraihu
Gũtara data ya ũhũthĩrĩ wa mũthako
Ũrũgamĩrĩri wa Ũthimi wa Mĩthako ya intanetinĩ nĩ mũhotithie. Ũrugarĩ wa mũtambo no wambatĩre.
Nyihia ihinda rĩa gweterera gwa kũhutia kũgerera tekinoronjĩ ya kĩnyitithania kĩihũru kĩa ũterebi kũhutia, no gũkũ nĩ gũkwongerera ũrugarĩ wa mũtambo na kũnyihia ũtũũro wa batarĩ.
Ndemwa cia ĩgũrũ cionithagia ũhũthĩri wa hinya wĩ thĩ na ũtũũro wa batarĩ mũraihu.
Ndemwa cia ĩgũrũ cionithagia thenema cia ũkĩnyanĩru wa igũrũ.
Ndemwa cia ĩgũrũ cionithagia ũmenyeru mwega wa ũrũgamĩrĩri wa mũthako.
Ndemwa cia ĩgũrũ cionithagia kwambatĩra gwa kahora kwa ũrugarĩ.
%d mĩthenya ya VIP niwagia burĩ na ũgacĩru
已开启极致帧率，将为您提供120fps游戏体验
开启后将为你提供120fps的极致游戏体验，但可能导致发热问题。
Kũgiria Kũhitia Kũru hari Cieko cia Gũthiũngũka
Remithia \"Hũũra Mbica ya Gĩcicio na Ciara 3\"
Rĩrĩa \"Hũũra mbica na Ciara 3\" yaremithio, ndũngĩhũũra mbica na Ciara 3.
Rĩrĩa ũrathaka mĩthako ũgĩkĩraga mwaki, Gwĩkĩra mwaki Kũgĩ nĩ gũkũnyihia hinya wa batarĩ wa gwĩkĩra mwaki, kũnyihie maumĩrĩra ma kũhiũha gwa thimũ na kwongerera ũtũũro wa batarĩ.
Kũrũgamĩrĩra Ũrugarĩ wa Gwĩkĩra mwaki nĩkwahotithio
Hutia harĩ gabica kanini ka programu nĩgetha ũmĩongerere
Ũrũgamĩrĩri wa Ũthimi wa Mĩthako ya intanetinĩ
Agĩrĩthia thibidi ya gũcokia kwa kũrũgamĩrĩra kũhetũkĩra gũcokia ũhoro wega wa kũhutia na wonania, no nĩgũtũma thimũ kũhioha.
Mĩhianĩre yandĩkĩtwo ĩ ho harĩ we.
Banga mũigana wa rate ya kĩrathi kia gũtambia mbica cia thĩinĩ wa mũthako kũrĩ \"Igũrũ\" na ũhotithie mũhianĩre ũyũ.
No wanjie kũheana wĩra thĩinĩ wa mũthako na kũhihinya itube cia thauti +/-.
Kũgacĩrithia Mĩcoro gũtirĩ ho hari Mũbango wa Ũmenyereri wa maitho.
已开启优化功耗，将为您提供流畅60fps游戏体验
开启后将为你优化发热和功耗，并提供60fps的高帧游戏体验
Kũingĩra na Ihenya Indoinĩ cia Wĩra
Rĩtwa rĩerũ rũtibataire gũkorwo ta rĩrĩa rĩa ma
Kiugo kĩa kũhetũka kĩna mahĩtia. Ndakwĩhoya ũgerie rĩngĩ

Kwa ũgĩ menya ũruti wĩra wa mĩthako mĩanya na gaacĩria kũringana nĩguo kũheana ũmenyeru wa kũhutia gwa mũthako mũno. Rĩrĩa yakorwo nĩhotithĩtio, icũnjĩ cia kũhũtia nĩcikũmenywo thĩinĩ wa mũthako wa mbere wa ihinda rĩa mũthako.
Thutha wa Wi-Fi kũhorio, data ya thimũ nĩ cikũhũthĩrwo handũ ha ũguo.
Yagĩrithagia mwonekano wa mũhianĩre wa ũthiũ wa kĩndũ; o ũrĩa mũhianĩre wĩna hinya, noguo mũigana wĩ igũrũ.

Wega wa mũhianĩre wa mũthako. Kũrũnga na thutha kũnyihagia ũkinyanĩru wa mbica gũkũ ĩkĩgacĩragia ũruti wa wĩra. (Gũtwarithia igũrũ kũororohagia mbica ĩgĩkĩraga hinya ũruti wa wĩra; gũtwarithia thĩ kwagĩrithagia ũgĩ wa mbica.)
Rũnga harĩ ũkĩnyanĩru wa igũrũ wa mbica kana ihenya rĩa kũruta rĩa igũrũ.
Mũtambo wa kũrekondi nĩ ũrahũthĩka nĩ programu ĩngĩ. Ũrorio ũhinge programu mbere
Mĩhianĩre yoothe ĩrĩ %1$s nĩ ci gũkorwo ho mũthakoinĩ ũyũ thutha wa kũũruta.
Watho wĩĩgiĩ Ũgitĩri wa Ũndũ Kĩũmbe
Kũratha ũhũthĩri wa CPU mũnene nĩgetha kũnyihia kũgũithia fremu na kwĩgucia
Join us to enjoy magic sound transformation privileges
Gũtirĩ na wa ũnyitani netiwaki. Ndakwĩhoya ũrore ũtariĩ wa netiwaki
Cenjia mũgambo waku ihinda-inĩ rĩa ma wĩ mathakoinĩ.
No ũgwatanĩre macokio maku kũhetũkĩra %1$s kana ũtũhũrĩre ithwe harĩ %2$s.
Magic Button ĩgwĩtĩkĩragia ũhee wĩra cieko harĩ gĩcicio itubeinĩ cia thauti cia ma, na njĩra o ĩyo gwĩthondekera cieko cia itube cia thauti harĩ mĩthako.
Tindĩka kwa ihinda rĩraihu na ũgucie gĩtube gĩa + kana - kũrĩ handũ harĩa ũrenda kũmapu na wakĩrĩrie
Banga cieko cia itube cia thauti harĩ mĩthako
Nĩyarĩkia kũhee wĩra cieko gĩtube gĩa thauti. Itube cia thauti itingĩhũthĩka rĩngĩ kũiganania thauti, no noũrute igũrũ kĩbungo nĩgetha wĩke ũguo.
Rehe igũrũ kĩbungo kĩũgĩ na ũkĩhũthĩre kũiganania thauti
Ũrĩa ũkũiganania thauti rĩrĩa Magic Button yakio?
Hihinya kwa ihinda iraihu na ũkururie \"+\" kũrĩ gĩtube kĩa Mwaki
No wakie kana ũhorie gĩĩko gĩa kũhe wĩra o gĩtube gĩa thauti, na ũhutie Thutha Ũcio gũbanga cieko cia o gĩtube.

No wĩthondekere cieko cia itube cia thauti harĩ mĩthako. Ha mũhiano, kũrũria gĩtube gĩa \"+\" harĩ mbica ya gĩtube kĩa Mwaki harĩ gĩcicio kĩa mũthako, arabu wĩige mũbango na wĩigĩre kũrĩ mũthako. Rĩu no ũhihinye gĩtube kĩa Thauti Igũrũ nĩgetha wanjie kũratha.
Ũhũthũ wongereirwo ũgacĩragia maumĩrĩra ma kũhutia, gũkũ ũhũthũ mũnyihie ũgacĩragia ũigananĩru wa ũrũgamĩrĩri na kũnyihia kũingĩrĩrwo na kũhutio kwa maheni.
Kũrũgamĩrĩra ũhutia wa Ũthimi wa Mĩthako ya intanetinĩ
Rĩrĩa ĩ hingũre, nĩ ĩheanaga ũmenyeru wa ũrũgamĩrĩri wa mĩthako na ĩkanyihia ihinda rĩa ũcokio wa ũrũgamĩrĩri.
O ũria ũcokio wĩ igũrũ, noguo ũcokio wa gũterethithia wĩ wa naihenya. O ũria ũcokio wĩ thĩ, noguo ũigananĩru wa kuona wĩ mũingĩ ũgĩterethithia.
Mũthemba wa imenyithia cia ndũmĩrĩri riria ĩ mĩthakoinĩ.
Kũrũngirĩra kũnene kũhotithagia ũmenyo wa kũrũngirĩra kũnini kũrĩa gũtarĩ mahĩtia, o hĩndĩ ĩyo kũrũngirĩra kwa thĩĩ kũnyihagia ũigwi wa ũtwarithia wa kwĩhanda kwa ũruti wĩra.

"Nĩwega nĩũndu wa gwĩtĩkia gwaku na kũhũthĩra indo na ũtungata witũ. Nĩgetha kũheana indo na motungata maitũ, nĩ tũbataraga gũkinyĩra intaneti, gũbatara marũtha mamwe kuma thimũinĩ yaku, na kũhũthĩra ũhoro wa kĩũmbe waku: 1. Kũringana na wĩtĩkĩria waku, nĩtũkuoya ũhoro wa mũbango wa ũthondeki akaunti yaku harĩ kũingĩra. 2. Kũringana na wĩtĩkĩria waku, nĩtũkuoya ũhoro wa mũtaratara waku na namba ya thimũ nĩguo kũrĩkĩrĩria marĩhi ma kĩrĩa wetia na tũheane motungata marĩhĩtwo maria maringithanagia. Kĩhumo kĩa watho witũ wa gũthuthuria ũhoro waku nĩ gwĩtĩkĩra gwaku kana kandarathi na we. Na kũhutia Ĩtĩkĩra, ũronania atĩ nĩwetĩkanĩria na kĩrĩkanĩro kũrĩ mawatho magwetetwo thĩinĩ Kĩrĩkanĩro kia Mũhũthĩri na Watho wĩigiĩ Ũgitĩri wa Ũndũ Kĩumbe."
Wahihinya ĨTĨKĨRA, nĩ wetĩkĩra kũrĩ mawatho mandĩkĩtwo harĩ %s na %s itũ.
Ndũkanyitithanie otomatikarĩ kũrĩ Wi-Fi rĩrĩa ũrahũthĩra netiwaki ya thimũ.
Kwa ũgĩ cagũra Wi-Fi na data ya thimũ nĩguo kũnyihia kwĩgucia kwa netiwaki. Data ya thimũ no ĩhũthĩrwo nginya rĩrĩa netiwaki ya Wi-Fi ĩnyitithanĩtio.
Kwendekithia kwa ũrũgamĩrĩri wa ihumo cia netiwaki cia mĩthako ya ihindainĩ rĩrĩ na tekinoronjĩ ya kwagĩrithia netiwaki ya kĩũmbe ya mũthako.
Kũhanyũkia mĩnyitanĩrĩ ya Intaneti ya Mũthako
No network connection. Please check your network and %s
Ndũmĩrĩri kuma gwĩ programu citarĩ cia rũrenda rwa gwĩtĩkĩra citikũmenyithio rĩngĩ rĩrĩa ũrathaka mũthako.
Kĩbũngo kĩrĩa kĩra thiũrũrũkira igũrũ ndĩhotithĩtio harĩ kĩonereria kĩa ihindainĩ rĩrĩ
Onia ndũmĩrĩri cia WhatsApp na Messenger harĩ gĩcicio kĩa mũthako ci mũthemba wa ngucanio
Watonga ÎTÎKÎRIA, ûgwîtîkîra masharti jetû jaria jandîkwi kîrî %s na %s.
Watonga ÎTÎKÎRIA, ûgwîtîkîra masharti jetû jaria jandîkwi kîrî Kîrîikaniro kia Mûtumîri na Sheria cia Siri.

Ibwega nîûntû bwa wîîtîkio bwaku na gûtumîra into na huduma cietû. Kûejana into na huduma cietû, nîbatere gûkinyîra intaneti na kûewa ndûûtha ii thimu yaku, kûûthûrania na gûtumîra ndata imwe ciaku. Gîtûmi kia kûthithia ikûbwithia ûrîa mûtumîri akuigua na gûkûnenkera huduma. Mûsingi jwa gîîsheria juria tûthithagia ndata ciaku na ûmenyo bwa ndata bwaku bwa sheria iria îgûtumîka.
This keeps it in view until you unpin. Touch & hold Back and Overview to unpin.
To unpin this app, swipe up & hold
Terethithia kĩbungo njaa kuma mwenainĩ wa ũthiũ wa mũthako.

Mũbango wa Kũruta Wĩra nĩ ũkũgacĩrithia ũruti wa wĩra wa thimũ na nĩ wagĩrĩire kũrĩ mĩthako ĩracĩndana. Rĩrĩa ĩhotithĩtio, nĩ ĩkũgia mbica cina ũkinyanĩru wa igũrũ, no nĩ ĩkwongerera ũhũthĩri wa hinya na kũhioha kwa mũtambo. Nĩ kwendekithĩtio ũthakĩre kũrĩ handũũ hatarĩ ũrugarĩ wa igũrũ.

"Hatirĩ rũtha rwĩna bata.
Ndakwĩhoya ũhutie \"Mĩbango\"-\"Rũtha\"-Akania Rũtha."
"We need some of the permissions you rejected or the system failed to apply failed, please manually set to the page authorize, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
"You have rejected us to apply for authorization, please agree to authorization, otherwise the function can't be used normally!"
Gacĩrithia ũkinyanĩru wa mbica mĩthakoinĩ yothe
Hutia nĩgetha wone %1$s na %2$s. Wahuti \"Ĩtĩĩkĩra\", nĩwetĩkĩra mĩbango itũ ya rũtha na kĩrĩkanĩro.
Mũbango wa kũhonokia hinya nĩ ũkũgũithia ũruti wa wĩra wa mũtambo na wongerere ũtũũro wa batarĩ. Nĩ njega na mathako marĩa matarabatara ũkinyanĩru mũnene wa mbica.
Watho wĩĩgiĩ Ũgitĩri wa Ũndũ Kĩũmbe
%1$s nĩ kwanjia kũruta wĩra thutha wa kwanjia rĩngĩ mũthako, ndakwĩhoya wanjie rĩngĩ mũthako.
Kwagĩrithia gwa we mwene harĩ mũthako ũyũ nĩ ũkũremithio thutha wa mũthako wanjia rĩngĩ
Kwagĩrithia gwa we mwene harĩ mũthako ũyũ nĩ ũkũhotithio thutha wa mũthako wanjia rĩngĩ
Cenjia mũgambo ihinda-inĩ ria ma wĩ mathakoinĩ. Ingĩra %1$s.
Hatirĩ ũhoro ũrĩ ho. Ndakwĩhoya ũgerie rĩngĩ thuthainĩ
Iga maumĩrĩra ma ũtheri ma maa nĩguo gũthondeka mwonere wa mũthako wa ũma makĩria.
Ihĩtia rĩa kũiyũra kwa thenema. Ndakwĩhoya ũgerie rĩngĩ thuthainĩ

%1$s nĩyatambũra kũhagũka kũnene harĩ netiwaki ya mũthako rĩrĩa yauma mũthako wa mũico, na %2$d kwĩgucia kũnene kwa netiwaki na ihinda rĩa gweterera kũnene kwa netiwaki kwa %3$d mili sekondi. Kũhotithia kũhanyũkia mĩnyitanĩrĩ ya intaneti ya mũthako nĩ gũgũteithia kũnyihia ihinda rĩa gweterera nginya %4$d ms na yongerere ihenya rĩa netiwaki na %5$d%%
Remithia Mũbango wa Mũthako wa mũthako ũyũ?
Gũthiũngũka Mũtaratara kũrabatara gwakĩrĩrio maita merĩ na kũgacĩrithio nĩgetha gwĩthema na kuma kĩmahĩtia kũrĩ mũthako.
Rĩrĩa Mũbango wa Mũthako wĩ mwakie, gwa kahinda kanini horia ũtheri wa otomatiki nĩgetha gũtigĩrĩra gũthinga gũtinahutio.
Onia Kihaaro kia Gĩteithĩrĩria kia Mũthako harĩ ũrikĩru mũingĩ wa ũmenyeru wa mũthako.
Iga programu rungu wa Mũbango wa Mũthako.
Gũtara Data ya Ũhũthĩrĩ harĩ thiku 7
Mũigana wa igũrũ wa mĩbango nĩwakinyĩrwo
Wĩthondekithi %1$s mĩbango thĩiniĩ wa Kihaaro kia Gĩteithĩrĩria kia Mũthako ĩronanio haha. No ũrehe kana ũgwatanĩre mĩbango.
Nĩyaremwo kũrehe mũbango. Ndakwĩhoya rora kana mũhiano nĩũkũringana
Mũbango nĩwarehwa na ũgacĩru. Ndakwĩhoya rora hari mũthako ũringithanĩtio
Kobia %1$s ciugo cia kũhetũka na ũcigwatanĩre na arata aku. Mĩhiano ĩranyitwo mbaru na %2$s mũbango: %3$s
Rũgamia na ũkururie igũrũ nĩgetha ũcenjie handũ.
Rũgamia na ũkururie nĩgetha ũcenjie handũ
Terethithia na thĩinĩ nĩgetha ũhingũre Kĩhaaro kia Ũgĩ na ũhingũre programu harĩ mawindo marĩa mara thiũrũrũkira igũrũ.
Heana mĩhianĩre mĩũgĩ na hinya ta gũtarĩria hanini mahindainĩ maya na gũtaũra gwa gĩcicio kĩihũru harĩ maũndũ manaa.
Naihenya hingũra programu hari mawindo marĩa mara thiũrũrũkira igũrũ
Mũhianĩre wa Mũbango wa Mũthako ihindainĩ rĩrĩ ndũhotithĩtio harĩ mũbango wa gĩcicio kĩgayanie
Cenjia data ya Kadi ya SIM
Gũcokia ũhoro na njĩra ya Kũhutia gwa 4D
Failed to boost. Please check your network and try again
Gũkũ no kwongerere ũhũthĩri wa hinya & ũrugarĩ wa thimũ.
Gũtirĩ na wa ũnyitani netiwaki. Ndakwĩhoya ũrore netiwaki yaku na ũgerie rĩngĩ
Ndakwĩhoya wĩkĩre kadi ya SIM na ũgerie rĩngĩ
Ihinda nĩrĩthiru rĩa kũingĩra. Ndakwĩhoya ũingĩre rĩngĩ.
Wĩthondekere ũhuthũ wa kũrũgamĩrĩra na gũcokia kũringana na wendi waku na gĩkĩro kĩa ũgi.
Gũcokia kwa kũhutia ni ũndũ wĩna ũritũ makĩria, kwega kwĩ mĩthako ya MOBA.
Ũruti wĩra nĩ kũracokia makĩria, njega na kwoya mĩthako.
Gũcokia kwa kũhutia kwĩna ũndũ wĩna Ũritũ na kwĩna ũma, na njega kwi mĩthko mĩingĩ.
Gacĩrithia ũmenyeru waku wa kwona na kũgirirĩria wega imenyithia kumana na gũgũthumbũra.
Terethithia na ũrũgamie kuma kona cia gĩcicio nĩgetha ũhingũre kĩbungo gĩa Gĩteithĩrĩria kia Thenema
Ahũthĩri erũ no magĩe na %d mĩthenya ya VIP burĩ
Kĩrĩkanĩro kĩa Ũtungata kĩa Bagiti cia Mũgambo
Ingĩra kũrĩ Turbo ya Mũthako ya Xunyou
